mapper.select: select * from board order by bgroup desc,bstep asc
select * from board where bno = #{bno} and rownum = 1
mapper.update: update board set bstep = bstep+1 where bgroup>=#{bgroup} and bstep>=#{bstep}
update board set btitle = #{btitle}, bcontent = #{bcontent}, bfile = #{bfile}, bdate = sysdate where bno = #{bno}
